about.bio.1: My curiosity reaches into every dimension of life—from the visual craft of interface systems to the behavioral science underneath them. I study what makes people decide, trust, and return. That question drives everything: the design systems I architect, the brand standards I govern, and the creative teams I build. I operate at the intersection of visual direction, strategic thinking, and measurable outcomes—because great design that cannot prove its value is just decoration.
about.bio.2: What colleagues consistently surface about me: the ability to hold creative vision and operational rigor at the same time—and to translate both into language that moves executives to act.
about.quote.text: Brand standards without governance are suggestions. Design systems without adoption are artifacts. I build the structures that make both real.
about.title: Creative director. Systems architect. Outcomes obsessive.
about.value.0.desc: Every brand standard, every component, every interaction pattern begins with a precise question: what does the user need to feel confident right here?
about.value.0.title: User-centered by discipline
about.value.1.desc: Typography, color, iconography, motion—the details that separate a trusted digital experience from one that simply functions.
about.value.1.title: Visual craft as a standard
about.value.2.desc: Design strategy only creates value when it moves through the organization. I build the coalitions that make adoption inevitable.
about.value.2.title: Influence without authority
about.value.3.desc: Every creative decision connects to a metric. If I cannot articulate the business case, the design is not ready.
about.value.3.title: Outcomes-driven

modal.project.0.challenge: Within four months of adoption, insights generated by the platform directly informed targeted marketing campaigns and customer engagement strategies that reversed a negative profit trajectory. The business moved from a –17% margin to a +2% margin, improved customer retention and subscription renewals, increased average cart size, and reduced friction for onboarding new customers — demonstrating how thoughtfully applied generative AI can drive measurable commercial outcomes when grounded in meaningful design and research principles.

modal.project.0.outcome.0: Reversed negative profitability — from a –17% operating margin to +2% within four months through AI-informed creative and marketing strategy.
modal.project.0.outcome.1: 15% improvement in customer retention and subscription renewals from actionable behavioral insights surfaced by the platform.
modal.project.0.outcome.2: 10% increased average cart size and customer lifetime value through precision targeting enabled by persona intelligence.
modal.project.0.outcome.3: Reduced customer acquisition friction by proactively addressing behavioral needs before they became objections.
modal.project.0.outcome.4: Scaled organizational awareness of customers, empowering ~40 users across sales, customer service, field development, and executive leadership.
modal.project.0.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.0.overview: An AI-assisted persona generation platform built on live and active business intelligence data. Combines structured behavioral, demographic, and psychological insights — enabling teams to understand not just who customers are, but how and why they make decisions. Designed to translate complex data into actionable creative and marketing direction.

modal.project.1.category: Design Systems & Brand Governance · Consumer Digital
modal.project.1.challenge: Architected and led delivery of a comprehensive enterprise design system to modernize a fragmented web and portal experience spanning marketing, sales, consumer-facing reports, and internal communications tools. The goal was not only visual renewal, but a durable system of brand governance — improving consistency, scalability, and execution speed while aligning creative decisions with business outcomes.
modal.project.1.kpi.0.label: Reduction in Delivery Time
modal.project.1.kpi.1.label: Designers Impacted
modal.project.1.kpi.2.label: More Design Deliverables
modal.project.1.kpi.3.label: Designer Hours Saved
modal.project.1.outcome.0: Established consistent visual design patterns across products — eliminating brand inconsistencies between designers and teams through governed standards.
modal.project.1.outcome.1: A shared source of creative truth — clarifying scope, deliverables, and brand expectations for all design artifacts across the organization.
modal.project.1.outcome.2: Alignment between creative strategy and business goals by embedding brand intent directly into system standards and component documentation.
modal.project.1.outcome.3: Increased confidence and autonomy of junior and mid-level designers through clear, repeatable visual patterns and brand governance guidelines.
modal.project.1.outcome.4: Gained executive trust through visible, consistent brand standards referenced across deliverables org-wide — design elevated from service to strategic function.
modal.project.1.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.1.overview: Delivered as a hybrid greenfield and progressive migration, the system lives in Figma and is referenced directly in Contentful — enabling designers, engineers, and leaders to operate from a single governed source of creative truth. Adoption materially improved delivery speed, visual quality, and team confidence, transforming design from a reactive service into a scalable, strategic brand capability.

modal.project.2.category: CX Strategy & Conversion Design · Consumer Digital
modal.project.2.challenge: Defined the experience strategy and visual design for a new membership join flow and entrepreneurial advancement experience. The core challenge is twofold: making it genuinely easy for new and existing members to join in compliance with company requirements, and ensuring prospective members clearly understand the value of both the products and the business opportunity — without confusion, friction, or mistrust.
modal.project.2.kpi.0.label: Target NPS Increase
modal.project.2.kpi.1.label: Touchpoints Redesigned
modal.project.2.kpi.2.label: Projected Churn ↓
modal.project.2.kpi.3.label: Target Completion
modal.project.2.outcome.0: Clarified membership value proposition through visual hierarchy and interaction design — reducing hesitation and confusion at tier selection.
modal.project.2.outcome.1: Improved trust and brand transparency in cart and checkout through clearer visual expectations and guided success states.
modal.project.2.outcome.2: Enabled subscription-led membership activation as a first-class visual experience rather than an optional afterthought.
modal.project.2.outcome.3: Reduced friction for members advancing toward entrepreneurial participation through clearer visual and interaction progression.
modal.project.2.outcome.4: Established a scalable visual join and advancement framework aligned with long-term retention and brand growth.
modal.project.2.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.2.overview: This initiative reframes membership as a guided visual progression rather than a transactional gate — aligning interaction design, subscription mechanics, and brand standards across landing pages, cart, and checkout. Designed to encourage first-time visitors to join with confidence and advance toward sharing the business. A scalable creative foundation improving conversion, reducing abandonment, and supporting sustainable growth.

modal.project.2.quote.text: By simplifying the membership journey and aligning it with subscription-based product engagement, we plan to reduce effort at the most fragile points of conversion. Early analysis shows faster completion times, higher subscription attachment at join, and improved confidence — an update that can potentially support both revenue and long-term success.

modal.project.2.title: Membership Join Experience
modal.project.4.challenge: Leading the end-to-end visual and interaction redesign of cart and checkout for a high-growth eCommerce company facing critical revenue leakage from extreme abandonment exceeding 80%. Declining consumer trust and checkout flows that diverged significantly from modern visual design and brand standards positioned this as a business recovery effort — not a cosmetic refresh.

modal.project.4.kpi.1.label: Less Abandonment

modal.project.4.outcome.0: Clear, brand-consistent cart experience addressing consumer uncertainty at the point of purchase through visual hierarchy and trust signals.
modal.project.4.outcome.1: Reduced cognitive effort in checkout flows by eliminating unnecessary steps, visual ambiguity, and interaction friction.
modal.project.4.outcome.2: Enabled subscriptions as a first-class visual action directly within the cart experience.
modal.project.4.outcome.3: Parity with modern retail visual design and UX standards — closing the brand credibility gap with top-performing competitors.
modal.project.4.outcome.4: Measurable growth in revenue, retention, and consumer trust metrics through isolated, validated visual and interaction improvements.
modal.project.4.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.4.overview: Restoring consumer trust through visual clarity, reducing cognitive load, and enabling revenue-positive behaviors directly within the cart — including subscriptions, upsell, and frictionless express checkout. Partnering with executive leadership, PMO, and engineering to establish a design-led creative roadmap that aligns visual interaction decisions with business outcomes.

modal.project.5.challenge: Leading the experience strategy and visual design for a new sitewide intelligent search component to address a critical trust and relevance failure. Legacy search returned inaccurate results, forcing users to rely on external search engines to find products — directly undermining conversion, brand confidence, and consumer trust.
modal.project.5.kpi.0.label: Smart Search Results
modal.project.5.kpi.1.label: Accuracy in SERP
modal.project.5.kpi.2.label: Revenue & Growth
modal.project.5.kpi.3.label: Official Kickoff Date
modal.project.5.outcome.0: Restore brand trust in on-site search by prioritizing exact, intent-matched results in the most visible visual positions.
modal.project.5.outcome.1: Reduce user effort by guiding searches that yield ambiguous or no results rather than failing silently — brand confidence through visual clarity.
modal.project.5.outcome.2: Accelerate paths to cart and checkout through intelligent product recommendations and visually surfaced upsell logic.
modal.project.5.outcome.3: Unify discovery across products, content, support, and business resources into a single, visually coherent branded experience.
modal.project.5.outcome.4: Establish search as a strategic brand tool and growth lever supporting subscriptions, membership, and consumer retention.
modal.project.5.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.5.overview: Search is a core consumer brand experience layer — not a utility. By combining deterministic relevance logic with a custom AI API layer and governed visual design standards, the new system delivers exact, high-confidence results, guides users when intent is unclear, and surfaces recommendations that accelerate cart, checkout, subscription, and membership actions.
